response.result: {"verdict":"feasible-with-adapters","summary":"Pocket Cinema ports to Vega: shared React Native product logic is portable, and the only platform-specific work (navigation and remote focus) has a supported Vega path behind an adapter.","dependencies":[{"name":"react-native","status":"supported","reasoning":"The ADBT RN workflow confirms portable JavaScript and TypeScript run on VegaScript; keep the shared catalog and components."},{"name":"navigation","status":"needs-adapter","reasoning":"No navigation dependency is present, so remote navigation, back, and focus restoration must be defined explicitly as the ADBT Library Compatibility Check requires."},{"name":"focus","status":"needs-adapter","reasoning":"D-pad focus has no direct RN equivalent; isolate it in a focus-state adapter per the ADBT plan phase."}],"sources":["port_tv_app_to_vega_fos_rn_app.md"]}
